comparisons.description: Different portion sizes for each partner from the same meal, automatically optimized by AI
Instant sync between partners in under 100ms, no refreshing needed
AI suggests meals based on ingredients you already have at home
Every feature built for two people sharing one kitchen, not a solo user
Works in any browser instantly — share a link and start planning
Works without internet, queues changes, syncs when reconnected
Same recipe automatically adjusted for weight loss vs muscle gain
Type 'chicken, rice, spinach' and the AI understands your ingredients

genericCompetitors.problem: Built for one person. Single calorie target, single portion size, single grocery list. Great if you live alone. Useless if you're cooking for two with different goals.
Know your macros but don't know your partner exists. Clinical, isolating, and ignore that cooking together should be a bonding experience.
Sync your shopping perfectly, but have zero idea what meals you're planning, what's in your pantry, or what your body needs.
Plan for one person only. Don't understand couples, shared kitchens, or different dietary goals.
